relatedPrograms.name: Columbia Clippers
relatedPrograms.eligibility: For the 2026-2027 season, new-swimmer tryouts are limited to swimmers age 10 and under as of March 1, 2027. Swimmers transferring from another USA Swimming club use a separate inquiry process.
highlights: Training groups range from Novice and Development through Competition, Junior, and Senior
The published meet season runs from September through August, with events for varied ages and qualifying levels
Group-based swim training, with dryland included for some groups
relatedPrograms.practiceSetting: The published 2025-2026 schedule lists practices at indoor pools at Columbia Swim Center and Supreme Sports Club.
relatedPrograms.summerLeagueFit: Year-round club swimming can complement outdoor summer-league swimming through continued coached practice and competition. The Clippers are a separate USA Swimming club with their own tryout, registration, practice, and meet requirements.
